# v2.1.0 — using-harness skill entry / 工作流入口 Skill

## English

- **Breaking:** removed `AGENTS.md`; workflow is `skills/using-harness/SKILL.md` + `references/workflow.md`
- Core skill renamed `mini-harness` → **`using-harness`**
- Plugin install works immediately; Session hooks remind even before repo `install`
- Run `python harness/scripts/mini_harness.py update --root .` in activated repos to migrate

## 中文

- **破坏性变更：** 移除 `AGENTS.md`；工作流在 `skills/using-harness/SKILL.md` 与 `references/workflow.md`
- 核心 Skill 重命名为 **`using-harness`**
- 插件安装即可用；未 `install` 的仓库也会收到 Session 钩子提醒
- 已激活仓库请执行 `python harness/scripts/mini_harness.py update --root .` 完成迁移
